device-key: non-extractable WebCrypto
IndexedDB (НЕ chrome.storage) — PoP
(рішення C1)

span.p:
token at-rest: chrome.storage.local
+ AES-GCM non-extractable ключ
читати лише з background SW

span.p:
Зовнішній L4: nftables / cloud-SG / WAF
SYN/handshake/frame-flood = accepted-risk
(D5 + U1: frame-DoS НЕ app-side)

div.style: color: rgb(20, 51, 26) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
color: rgb(58, 13, 34) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Герметичний chokepoint — NET-NEW
default-deny -32601 ДО dispatch
admission(): global-pause → per-user-floor →
new-recipient → budget-reserve (W16)
IDOR-guard: account з principal, НЕ з аргумента

div.style: color: rgb(58, 13, 34) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
per-connection principal (V8: per-invocation)
token→Principal, PoP-pending gate

token→identity: HMAC + окремий pepper
prefix-version-hint → 1 lookup (D10)
pre-image = decoded-random (W18)
